description: Firefox autofill parser reads formhistory.sqlite moz_formhistory table and emits BrowserEvent per entry
steps: Query: SELECT fieldname, value, timesUsed, firstUsed, lastUsed FROM moz_formhistory WHERE firstUsed > 0 ORDER BY firstUsed ASC
Test: parse_single_formhistory_entry — attrs[fieldname] and attrs[value] correct, ts_ns = firstUsed * 1_000
